title.zh: 消费降级、银发经济与大健康结构性机会
title.en: Consumer Downgrade, Silver Economy, and Structural Healthcare Opportunities

thesis.zh: 消费链条正在从总量弹性转向结构分化：银发消费、医疗健康、糖替代和 B 端餐饮渗透可能形成防御性需求，但需要验证支付能力和渠道真实动销。
thesis.en: Consumption is shifting from aggregate beta to structural divergence: silver-economy demand, healthcare, sugar substitutes, and B-end catering penetration may create defensive demand, but purchasing power and channel sell-through must be validated.

zh: 消费降级下哪些子行业仍具备真实需求韧性？
银发消费和大健康是长期底座还是短期防御交易？
糖替代、餐饮 B 端和医疗链条如何验证动销质量？
en: Which subsectors retain real demand resilience under consumer downgrade?
Are silver-economy and healthcare themes a durable base or a defensive trade?
How should sugar substitutes, B-end catering, and healthcare chains validate sell-through quality?

evidence.title_zh: 验证食品加工链下游需求端：B端餐饮渗透与GLP-1对糖替代品的消费驱动
evidence.title_en: Downstream food-processing demand: B-end catering penetration and GLP-1 sugar-substitute pull
evidence.summary_zh: 验证食品加工链下游需求端：B端餐饮渗透与GLP-1对糖替代品的消费驱动。 截至2026年5月18日，食品加工行业的复苏并非虚假繁荣，而是由两条极具确定性的需求主线驱动：一是餐饮行业在极致降本诉求下对B端半成品的加速渗透；二是GLP-1药物普及带来的全球“减糖”革命对阿洛酮糖等新型代糖的爆炸性需求。 GLP-1类药物（如司美格鲁肽）在全球的广泛处方，不仅是医药事件，更是消费领域重大的破坏性创新。
evidence.summary_en: The source validates two defensive growth lines in food processing: restaurant operators using B-end semi-finished products to lower labor and kitchen costs, and GLP-1-driven sugar reduction supporting allulose and other next-generation sweeteners.
evidence.implication_zh: 提示消费降级并不等于所有消费链条走弱，降本和健康替代可能同时创造结构性需求。
evidence.implication_en: Shows that consumer downgrade can coexist with structural demand created by cost reduction and healthier substitution.

evidence.title_zh: 研究记录04｜养老金体系转型与银发消费底座（压力测试）
evidence.title_en: Pension-system transition and the silver-economy consumption base
evidence.summary_zh: 压力测试/部分否定 研究记录03 关于"银发经济 16 万亿"线性外推到自费医疗的隐含假设——养老金+地产双约束下，自费弹性应下修。 养老金体系转型在十五五（2026-2030）期间能为大健康内需提供 结构性但不充裕 的支撑：第一支柱替代率下行 + 第二支柱覆盖窄 + 第三支柱个人养老金渗透率低，叠加地产财富效应明显衰减，使得 60+ 人群可自由支配的"健康消费现金流"远低于市场基于"银发经济 16 万亿"的线性外推。 研究记录04｜…
evidence.summary_en: The pension stress test argues that silver-economy healthcare demand is real but cash-flow constrained: basic medical insurance and long-term care insurance support rigid demand, while high-end self-pay medical services need lower expectations.
evidence.implication_zh: 把银发经济从总规模叙事拆成可支付现金流、政策支付和自费弹性三部分，防止高端自费医疗被过度外推。
evidence.implication_en: Separates the silver-economy headline from actual cash-flow support, policy reimbursement, and self-pay elasticity.

evidence.title_zh: 消费降级风险对“以旧换新”驱动力的影响评估
evidence.title_en: Consumer-downgrade risk and the quality of trade-in replacement demand
evidence.summary_zh: research note 指出新华财经-家装产业链指数 30 日激活率仅 4%（8/198），核心源于市场对“消费降级 → 家装总盘子萎缩”的悲观假设。 支持 research note 的方向性判断，但需对“红利兑现节奏”做结构性下修： 消费降级并不会整体抹平“以旧换新”政策红利，却会显著重塑红利分布——客单价被压缩、品类向“刚需替换 + 适老化 + 局部翻新”集中、品牌端的强者愈强（白牌出清加速）。 衔接：承接 research…
evidence.summary_en: The trade-in demand note warns that policy stimulus and replacement demand must be separated from true discretionary recovery; sell-through, subsidy intensity, and household balance-sheet pressure determine earnings quality.
evidence.implication_zh: 要求用客单价、折扣率、信用压力和真实动销验证政策刺激或高端消费韧性。
evidence.implication_en: Requires validation through ticket size, discount rate, credit stress, and real sell-through rather than headline demand.

evidence.title_zh: 全球宏观压力测试报告：医疗行业与生物安全法案的成本锚点 (v2.0)
evidence.title_en: Healthcare cost anchor under the Biosecure Act and CXO decoupling
evidence.summary_zh: 我们认为，医疗行业——特别是以 $BIOSECURE\ Act$ 为核心的 CXO 脱钩进程——在政治成本树中扮演着“通胀/研发成本缓冲器”的角色。 尾部风险 (14%)；受限于美国选民对医疗价格的敏感度。 压力测试显示：在 场景 B2 (受控竞争) 下，当前的 2032 年宽限期是维持美方医药创新领先地位的“合规底线”。
evidence.summary_en: The healthcare macro stress test treats Biosecure Act risk, CXO decoupling, and compliance cost as a cost anchor that can change the margin profile of healthcare globalization.
evidence.implication_zh: 把大健康机会放入政策、合规、出海订单和回款节奏的利润率压力测试中。
evidence.implication_en: Places healthcare upside inside a margin stress test for policy, compliance, outbound orders, and cash collection.

evidence.title_zh: 创新药与医疗器械研发：截至2026-05-14的政策驱动重估
evidence.title_en: Policy-driven repricing of innovative drugs and medical-device R&D
evidence.summary_zh: 这说明代谢创新已不再只是糖尿病专科市场，而是依从性和慢性体重管理平台。 截至2026-05-14，我支持前序研究关于地缘科技风险溢价正在重定价的主线，但医药板块的重估机制不同：它不是由单一外交事件触发，而是由临床风险出清、支付改革和跨境授权验证共同推动。 医药行业对应芯片出口管制的变量，是生物安全和供应链筛查。
evidence.summary_en: The policy repricing note supports innovative drugs and medical devices, but the upside depends on reimbursement, procurement, product approval, and commercialization cadence rather than broad sector beta.
evidence.implication_zh: 把大健康机会放入政策、合规、出海订单和回款节奏的利润率压力测试中。
evidence.implication_en: Places healthcare upside inside a margin stress test for policy, compliance, outbound orders, and cash collection.

evidence.title_zh: 2026年大健康结构性机会的组合权重与A/H股交易路径
evidence.title_en: Healthcare structural opportunities and A/H-share portfolio path
evidence.summary_zh: 在2026-05-19的时间节点上，针对前期调研（医药行业分析师与生物科技分析师）反馈的结论，大健康产业的超额收益已从“全面创新”转向结构性赛道。 GLP-1 产业链全球需求高涨带来极高的业绩弹性，但考虑到 FDA 监管、海外交付节奏以及潜在地缘风险，必须对其给予明显的“履约折扣”。 作为港股（H股）18A板块的优质Alpha标的，随着外资对中国核心生物医药资产的重估，采取 Buy & Hold 策略，淡化短期波动。
evidence.summary_en: The strategy report proposes a barbell healthcare portfolio: high-certainty Hong Kong-listed anchors and tactical A-share high-beta positions, with different holding periods and risk discounts.
evidence.implication_zh: 把大健康机会放入政策、合规、出海订单和回款节奏的利润率压力测试中。
evidence.implication_en: Places healthcare upside inside a margin stress test for policy, compliance, outbound orders, and cash collection.

evidence.title_zh: 美国金融板块分析：消费信贷应力的传导与定价
evidence.title_en: Consumer-credit stress transmission and financial-sector pricing
evidence.summary_zh: 移交至： chief-risk [reviewer, trigger a/c]。 “滞胀式挤压”正在积极侵蚀美国底层 40% 消费者的偿付能力。 信用迁移： 除消费信贷外，K 型经济正在伤害小微企业（SMB）。
evidence.summary_en: The credit-stress report is a household purchasing-power cross-check: weaker consumer credit quality can cap discretionary healthcare, premium experience consumption, and replacement demand.
evidence.implication_zh: 要求用客单价、折扣率、信用压力和真实动销验证政策刺激或高端消费韧性。
evidence.implication_en: Requires validation through ticket size, discount rate, credit stress, and real sell-through rather than headline demand.

evidence.title_zh: 研究记录08｜内需刚性化与离岸美元期权约束下的A股大健康配置策略 — 2026-05-18
evidence.title_en: A-share healthcare allocation under rigid domestic demand and offshore-dollar constraints
evidence.summary_zh: 2026-2027 年政策允许个人养老金余额提前用于重大医疗支出，恢复自费医疗弹性。 低配 纯自费消费医疗 和 只有license-out headline的故事股；。 截至 2026-05-18，我对前序研究的综合判断是：A股大健康策略 不是 放弃跨境BD，而是停止把跨境BD当成组合核心。
evidence.summary_en: The allocation note frames domestic healthcare as a rigid-demand A-share exposure, but warns that offshore-dollar constraints and global risk appetite affect valuation and capital-flow timing.
evidence.implication_zh: 为消费降级下的结构性机会提供交叉验证，重点是支付能力、动销质量和现金流兑现。
evidence.implication_en: Provides cross-checking evidence for structural opportunities under consumer downgrade, with focus on purchasing power, sell-through quality, and cash-flow conversion.

evidence.title_zh: 战略分析：阿洛酮糖成本曲线压缩背景下的百龙创园（605016）配置价值
evidence.title_en: Bailong Chuangyuan and the allulose cost-curve compression thesis
evidence.summary_zh: 因为其增长并非简单的价格周期驱动，而是 GLP-1 时代生物基甜味剂对高果糖浆（HFCS）的结构性替代。 将 605016 视为纯粹代糖主题的投资者会被价格波动洗出；而将其视为 “生物基精密制造平台” 的投资者将能捕捉到显著的相对价值。 虽然市场担忧成本曲线的下移（正如研究记录04所述，现金成本从 25-32元/kg 下压至 16-22元/kg），但本策略师认为，这种价格压缩是区分 “主题投机标的” 与 “结构性复利标的” 的终极过滤…
evidence.summary_en: The allulose thesis focuses on cost-curve compression, continuous production, by-product recycling, and Thai capacity as evidence that sweetener demand can become margin advantage for a cost leader.
evidence.implication_zh: 提示消费降级并不等于所有消费链条走弱，降本和健康替代可能同时创造结构性需求。
evidence.implication_en: Shows that consumer downgrade can coexist with structural demand created by cost reduction and healthier substitution.

evidence.title_zh: 大健康产业链工业视角挑战 — 2026-05-18
evidence.title_en: Industrial challenge to healthcare-chain execution assumptions
evidence.summary_zh: 前序研究认为大健康研究不足，这一点方向上成立；但它高估了2026年催化的即时性和确定性。 “十五五”规划在2026年3月获批，重点支持制造业、战略性新兴产业、生物医药、高端装备、机器人和航空航天，但我审阅的来源没有验证上述核心部件“90%国产化率”的统一目标。 更稳妥的结论应更窄：老龄化需求与设备更新创造多年收入池，但2026年的alpha取决于可验证的制造瓶颈、医院资本开支节奏、集采价格和核心部件替代。
evidence.summary_en: The industrial challenge asks whether healthcare demand can be fulfilled through capacity, delivery, manufacturing quality, and supply-chain execution rather than only through thematic demand.
evidence.implication_zh: 为消费降级下的结构性机会提供交叉验证，重点是支付能力、动销质量和现金流兑现。
evidence.implication_en: Provides cross-checking evidence for structural opportunities under consumer downgrade, with focus on purchasing power, sell-through quality, and cash-flow conversion.

evidence.title_zh: 2026-05-18 外汇策略综合：生物医药出海BD浪潮下的离岸美元滞留
evidence.title_en: Outbound pharma BD and offshore-dollar retention
evidence.summary_zh: 截至2026年5月18日，综合宏观内需约束（研究记录03、04）与医疗行业的地缘政治摩擦（研究记录05、06），外汇市场的核心结论是：“全球BD/License-out”浪潮本质上是一个离岸美元滞留的故事，而非在岸人民币结汇的催化剂。 因此，大健康产业链的全球扩张成为了微观企业套息交易（Carry Trade）的驱动力：借入低息在岸人民币为研发融资，同时在离岸积累美元资产。 综合来看，A股和港股对这些创新药企的估值，本质上是对离岸美元…
evidence.summary_en: The outbound BD note links pharma globalization to offshore-dollar retention, deal timing, and cash repatriation, which can affect domestic valuation despite operating progress.
evidence.implication_zh: 把大健康机会放入政策、合规、出海订单和回款节奏的利润率压力测试中。
evidence.implication_en: Places healthcare upside inside a margin stress test for policy, compliance, outbound orders, and cash collection.

evidence.title_zh: 消费行业分析：验证高端体验消费的ASP与利润率变动趋势
evidence.title_en: Premium experience consumption: ASP and margin validation
evidence.summary_zh: 前序节点：中国宏观分析师 (china-macro) 提示五一人均消费下滑约0.7%，要求对高端体验消费的盈利逻辑进行压力测试。 我们建议剔除缺乏结构升级能力、单纯受损于ASP下滑的“伪体验消费”标的，坚定持有具备利润率护城河的龙头及稀缺演艺资产。 宏观数据反映的“流量稳健、人均消费微降”在微观层面得到印证。
evidence.summary_en: The premium-experience note stress-tests whether strong cruise and travel spending represent durable pricing power or a narrow high-income cohort that cannot offset broad consumer downgrade.
evidence.implication_zh: 要求用客单价、折扣率、信用压力和真实动销验证政策刺激或高端消费韧性。
evidence.implication_en: Requires validation through ticket size, discount rate, credit stress, and real sell-through rather than headline demand.

risk_matrix.title_zh: 支付能力不足导致银发自费医疗弹性低于叙事
risk_matrix.summary_zh: 养老金、地产财富效应和子女转移支付约束可能削弱高端自费医疗，只保留医保、长护险和康复辅具的刚性底座。
risk_matrix.summary_en: Pension, housing wealth, and intergenerational-transfer constraints can weaken premium self-pay healthcare, leaving reimbursement, long-term care, and rehabilitation devices as the rigid base.

risk_matrix.title_zh: 渠道补库被误读为真实动销
risk_matrix.title_en: Channel restocking mistaken for real sell-through
risk_matrix.summary_zh: 食品加工、B端餐饮、代糖和高端体验消费必须用复购、库存周转、客单价和客户留存验证，而不能只看订单或补库。
risk_matrix.summary_en: Food processing, B-end catering, sweeteners, and premium experience consumption need validation through repeat purchase, inventory turns, ticket size, and customer retention, not order headlines alone.

risk_matrix.title_zh: 政策支付和设备更新节奏慢于盈利兑现
risk_matrix.title_en: Policy reimbursement and equipment-renewal timing risk
risk_matrix.summary_zh: 医保、长护险和设备更新有政策确定性，但招采、定点和回款若慢于预期，订单会滞留在应收账款中。
risk_matrix.summary_en: Medical insurance, long-term care insurance, and equipment renewal have policy support, but slow tenders, designation, or collections can trap orders in receivables.

risk_matrix.title_zh: 生物安全与海外监管压低医药出海利润率
risk_matrix.title_en: Healthcare globalization compliance and regulatory discount
risk_matrix.summary_zh: CXO脱钩、FDA检查、关税和合规成本可能压低多肽原料药、创新药BD和海外IVD收入的利润保留率。
risk_matrix.summary_en: CXO decoupling, FDA inspections, tariffs, and compliance costs can reduce profit retention for peptide APIs, innovative-drug BD, and outbound IVD revenue.

risk_matrix.title_zh: GLP-1和减糖趋势的需求外推过快
risk_matrix.title_en: GLP-1 and sugar-reduction demand extrapolation risk
risk_matrix.summary_zh: 减糖趋势具备结构性，但价格下行、产能释放和终端配方替换速度会决定阿洛酮糖利润率。
risk_matrix.summary_en: Sugar reduction is structural, but price decline, capacity release, and reformulation speed determine allulose margins.

risk_matrix.title_zh: 高端体验消费韧性集中于少数人群
risk_matrix.title_en: Premium-experience resilience concentrated in a narrow cohort
risk_matrix.summary_zh: 高端体验消费可能只反映高收入人群韧性，不能直接推导大众消费或自费医疗全面修复。
risk_matrix.summary_en: Premium experience consumption may reflect high-income resilience rather than broad consumption or self-pay healthcare recovery.

rows.主要变量: 养老金、工资收入、地产财富效应、消费信贷
rows.财务传导: 决定自费医疗、高端体验和耐用品更新的上限
rows.投资含义: 先看现金流，不先看人口规模

rows.主要变量: 医保、长护险、设备更新、集采、地方财政
rows.财务传导: 决定刚性医疗需求能否变成订单和回款
rows.投资含义: 政策确定性需要折算拨付节奏

rows.主要变量: B端餐饮客户、终端复购、库存周转、折扣率
rows.财务传导: 验证补库是否为真实动销
rows.投资含义: 避免把渠道库存当作消费复苏

rows.主要变量: 产能、成本曲线、合规、质量和交付
rows.财务传导: 决定收入增长能否保住毛利率
rows.投资含义: 成本领先和合规交付应获得溢价

rows.主要变量: A/H股流动性、海外合规折价、主题拥挤度
rows.财务传导: 决定确定性与弹性资产的仓位权重
rows.投资含义: 把底仓和战术仓分开定价

rows.Main variables: Pensions, wage income, housing wealth effect, consumer credit
rows.Financial transmission: Sets the ceiling for self-pay healthcare, premium experience, and durable replacement
rows.Investment implication: Start with cash flow, not population size

rows.Main variables: Medical insurance, long-term care insurance, equipment renewal, procurement, local fiscal budget
rows.Financial transmission: Determines whether rigid healthcare demand becomes orders and collections
rows.Investment implication: Policy certainty must be adjusted for payment timing

rows.Main variables: B-end catering clients, terminal repeat purchase, inventory turns, discount rate
rows.Financial transmission: Tests whether restocking is real sell-through
rows.Investment implication: Avoid treating channel inventory as consumption recovery

rows.Main variables: Capacity, cost curve, compliance, quality, delivery
rows.Financial transmission: Determines whether revenue growth protects gross margin
rows.Investment implication: Cost leadership and compliant delivery deserve premium valuation

rows.Main variables: A/H liquidity, overseas compliance discount, theme crowding
rows.Financial transmission: Sets weights for certainty assets versus high-beta assets
rows.Investment implication: Price core holdings and tactical positions separately

rows.触发条件: 医保/长护险支出、康复设备招标、慢病用药放量同步改善
rows.宏观/资产含义: 消费降级中形成防御性成长
rows.投资动作: 提高医保链、康复和现金流确定资产权重

rows.触发条件: B端餐饮复购、阿洛酮糖价格稳定、GLP-1减糖需求持续
rows.宏观/资产含义: 食品加工和健康配料利润率改善
rows.投资动作: 配置成本领先和渠道验证充分的龙头

rows.触发条件: 消费信贷恶化、房价财富效应不修复、自费医疗降速
rows.宏观/资产含义: 高端体验和自费医疗估值下修
rows.投资动作: 降低纯概念和高端自费赛道权重

rows.触发条件: Biosecure/FDA/关税压力上升，BD回款慢于预期
rows.宏观/资产含义: 医药出海收入打折、A/H估值分化
rows.投资动作: 偏向国内刚需与海外现金流已验证标的

rows.Trigger: Medical/long-term care spending, rehab-device tenders, and chronic-drug uptake improve together
rows.Macro/asset implication: Defensive growth forms inside consumer downgrade
rows.Investor action: Raise reimbursement-chain, rehab, and cash-flow-certain exposure

rows.Trigger: B-end catering repeat orders, stable allulose pricing, persistent GLP-1 sugar-reduction demand
rows.Investor action: Own cost leaders with strong channel validation

rows.Trigger: Consumer credit worsens, housing wealth effect does not recover, self-pay healthcare slows
rows.Macro/asset implication: Premium experience and self-pay healthcare valuations fall
rows.Investor action: Cut generic concepts and premium self-pay exposure

rows.Trigger: Biosecure/FDA/tariff pressure rises; BD collections lag expectations
rows.Macro/asset implication: Outbound healthcare revenue gets discounted; A/H valuations diverge
rows.Investor action: Prefer domestic rigid demand and verified overseas cash flow

rows.投资暴露: 医保放量确定、慢病/自免药、IVD出海、康复设备、家用辅具
rows.配置逻辑: 刚性支付和政策确定性更强，抗消费降级能力较好
rows.关键检查项: 医保执行、院内放量、海外现金流、招投标回款

rows.投资暴露: B端食品加工、冷冻烘焙、预制食材、阿洛酮糖和减糖配料
rows.配置逻辑: 餐饮降本与健康替代形成双需求曲线
rows.关键检查项: 客户留存、复购率、库存周转、成本曲线、价格下行速度

rows.投资暴露: GLP-1多肽原料药、创新药BD、A股医疗设备更新事件
rows.配置逻辑: 弹性高但受监管、订单落地和资金拨付影响
rows.关键检查项: FDA检查、海外大单、BD付款、财政下达、产能审批

rows.投资暴露: 高端体检、抗衰、医美、高端体验消费、泛银发概念
rows.配置逻辑: 高度依赖自费弹性和高收入人群，容易被估值过度外推
rows.关键检查项: 客单价、折扣率、复购、房价财富效应、消费信贷逾期

rows.投资暴露: 消费信贷恶化、政策拨付延迟、海外合规和汇率
rows.配置逻辑: 用于校正自费需求、出海利润率和估值久期
rows.关键检查项: 信用卡/贷款数据、政策文件、FDA/关税事件、离岸美元流

rows.Exposure: Reimbursement-backed drugs, chronic and autoimmune medicines, outbound IVD, rehabilitation equipment, home assistive devices
rows.Rationale: Rigid payment and policy certainty offer better resistance to consumer downgrade
rows.Key checks: Reimbursement execution, hospital uptake, overseas cash flow, tender collections

rows.Exposure: B-end food processing, frozen bakery, prepared ingredients, allulose and sugar-reduction inputs
rows.Rationale: Restaurant cost reduction and healthier substitution create two demand curves
rows.Key checks: Customer retention, repeat purchase, inventory turns, cost curve, price decline pace

rows.Exposure: GLP-1 peptide APIs, innovative-drug BD, A-share medical-equipment renewal events
rows.Rationale: High upside but exposed to regulation, order conversion, and fiscal payment timing
rows.Key checks: FDA inspections, overseas orders, BD payments, fiscal releases, capacity approvals

rows.Exposure: Premium checkups, anti-aging, aesthetic medicine, premium experience consumption, generic silver-economy concepts
rows.Rationale: Highly dependent on self-pay elasticity and high-income cohorts; easy to over-extrapolate
rows.Key checks: Ticket size, discount rate, repeat purchase, housing wealth effect, consumer-credit delinquencies

rows.Exposure: Consumer-credit deterioration, policy payment delay, overseas compliance, FX
rows.Rationale: Corrects self-pay demand, outbound margin, and valuation duration
rows.Key checks: Credit-card/loan data, policy documents, FDA/tariff events, offshore-dollar flows

rows.指标: 养老金缴存/领取、医保和长护险支出、消费信贷逾期
rows.如何解读: 支付能力改善支持自费弹性；恶化则偏向刚性医保链
rows.证据来源: 人社/医保数据、金融机构披露、地方预算

rows.指标: B端客户复购、库存周转、终端折扣、客单价
rows.如何解读: 复购和周转改善才说明需求真实，不只是补库
rows.证据来源: 渠道调研、公司月度经营、餐饮客户订单

rows.指标: 医保准入、进院速度、设备更新招标、回款周期
rows.如何解读: 政策确定性需要转成医院使用和现金回款
rows.证据来源: 医保目录、招投标平台、公司公告

rows.指标: FDA检查、Biosecure Act、关税、BD付款与美元留存
rows.如何解读: 决定海外收入的利润保留率和估值折价
rows.证据来源: 监管公告、海关/订单、公司合同披露

rows.指标: A/H股换手率、资金流、估值分位、主题交易集中度
rows.如何解读: 拥挤时要提高兑现要求，避免单纯主题溢价
rows.证据来源: 交易所数据、ETF/北向/南向资金、行业估值

rows.Indicator: Pension contributions/payouts, medical and long-term care insurance spending, consumer-credit delinquencies
rows.Interpretation: Improvement supports self-pay elasticity; deterioration favors rigid reimbursement chains
rows.Evidence source: Human resources, medical-insurance data, financial disclosures, local budgets

rows.Indicator: B-end repeat purchase, inventory turns, terminal discounting, ticket size
rows.Interpretation: Better repeat purchase and turns prove demand; restocking alone does not
rows.Evidence source: Channel checks, company monthly operations, restaurant client orders

rows.Indicator: Reimbursement access, hospital uptake, equipment-renewal tenders, collection cycle
rows.Interpretation: Policy certainty must become hospital usage and cash collection
rows.Evidence source: Medical-insurance catalogues, tender platforms, company announcements

rows.Indicator: FDA inspections, Biosecure Act, tariffs, BD payments, offshore-dollar retention
rows.Interpretation: Determines profit retention and valuation discount for overseas revenue

rows.Indicator: A/H turnover, flows, valuation percentile, theme concentration
rows.Interpretation: Crowded trades require stronger execution evidence
rows.Evidence source: Exchange data, ETF and Stock Connect flows, sector valuation

rows.主要变量: 养老金、工资收入、地产财富效应、消费信贷
rows.财务传导: 决定自费医疗、高端体验和耐用品更新的上限
rows.投资含义: 先看现金流，不先看人口规模

rows.主要变量: 医保、长护险、设备更新、集采、地方财政
rows.财务传导: 决定刚性医疗需求能否变成订单和回款
rows.投资含义: 政策确定性需要折算拨付节奏

rows.主要变量: B端餐饮客户、终端复购、库存周转、折扣率
rows.财务传导: 验证补库是否为真实动销
rows.投资含义: 避免把渠道库存当作消费复苏

rows.主要变量: 产能、成本曲线、合规、质量和交付
rows.财务传导: 决定收入增长能否保住毛利率
rows.投资含义: 成本领先和合规交付应获得溢价

rows.主要变量: A/H股流动性、海外合规折价、主题拥挤度
rows.财务传导: 决定确定性与弹性资产的仓位权重
rows.投资含义: 把底仓和战术仓分开定价

rows.触发条件: 医保/长护险支出、康复设备招标、慢病用药放量同步改善
rows.宏观/资产含义: 消费降级中形成防御性成长
rows.投资动作: 提高医保链、康复和现金流确定资产权重

rows.触发条件: B端餐饮复购、阿洛酮糖价格稳定、GLP-1减糖需求持续
rows.宏观/资产含义: 食品加工和健康配料利润率改善
rows.投资动作: 配置成本领先和渠道验证充分的龙头

rows.触发条件: 消费信贷恶化、房价财富效应不修复、自费医疗降速
rows.宏观/资产含义: 高端体验和自费医疗估值下修
rows.投资动作: 降低纯概念和高端自费赛道权重

rows.触发条件: Biosecure/FDA/关税压力上升，BD回款慢于预期
rows.宏观/资产含义: 医药出海收入打折、A/H估值分化
rows.投资动作: 偏向国内刚需与海外现金流已验证标的

rows.Main variables: Pensions, wage income, housing wealth effect, consumer credit
rows.Financial transmission: Sets the ceiling for self-pay healthcare, premium experience, and durable replacement
rows.Investment implication: Start with cash flow, not population size

rows.Main variables: Medical insurance, long-term care insurance, equipment renewal, procurement, local fiscal budget
rows.Financial transmission: Determines whether rigid healthcare demand becomes orders and collections
rows.Investment implication: Policy certainty must be adjusted for payment timing

rows.Main variables: B-end catering clients, terminal repeat purchase, inventory turns, discount rate
rows.Financial transmission: Tests whether restocking is real sell-through
rows.Investment implication: Avoid treating channel inventory as consumption recovery

rows.Main variables: Capacity, cost curve, compliance, quality, delivery
rows.Financial transmission: Determines whether revenue growth protects gross margin
rows.Investment implication: Cost leadership and compliant delivery deserve premium valuation

rows.Main variables: A/H liquidity, overseas compliance discount, theme crowding
rows.Financial transmission: Sets weights for certainty assets versus high-beta assets
rows.Investment implication: Price core holdings and tactical positions separately

rows.Trigger: Medical/long-term care spending, rehab-device tenders, and chronic-drug uptake improve together
rows.Macro/asset implication: Defensive growth forms inside consumer downgrade
rows.Investor action: Raise reimbursement-chain, rehab, and cash-flow-certain exposure

rows.Trigger: B-end catering repeat orders, stable allulose pricing, persistent GLP-1 sugar-reduction demand
rows.Investor action: Own cost leaders with strong channel validation

rows.Trigger: Consumer credit worsens, housing wealth effect does not recover, self-pay healthcare slows

rows.Investor action: Cut generic concepts and premium self-pay exposure
